rank.description: Cross-sectional percentile ranking of x (higher is better).

zscore.description: Z-score standardization of x (cross-sectional or as defined by your factor engine).

ts_sum.description: Rolling time-series sum over the last n observations.

ts_mean.description: Rolling time-series mean over the last n observations.

ts_prod.description: Rolling time-series product over the last n observations.

gt.description: Elementwise comparison x > c returning numeric 1/0 so it can be used as a regime mask.
